key_risks: July 2 employment report volatility could trigger sharp sector rotations
Micron-related AI enthusiasm may fail to lift broader semis or biotech holdings
Inflation readings embedded in PCE and CPI data could pressure rate-sensitive small caps

portfolio.rationale: Strong 7d outperformance amid positive macro data including upward GDP revision and rising PMI readings.
4.63% 7d gain with supportive employment and consumption trends in briefing.
Recent outperformance in small-value segment alongside broad US growth signals.
Diversified exposure to reduce concentration risk while capturing domestic equity momentum.

portfolio_rationale: Allocates to sectors with recent strength and macro tailwinds from PMI, GDP, and employment data to target outperformance versus SP500 over the one-week window ending on jobs-report day.
rationale_summary: Biotech and healthcare lead due to briefing-highlighted positive data; small-value and equal-weight provide balance against concentration and reversal risks.
